overview.description: AI Research & Development Studio building edge AI products for public safety and offering AI consulting services
overview.description_long: HLACIK s.r.o. is a Prague-based AI R&D studio founded by experienced ML practitioners. The company builds edge AI hardware-software products — SOWA (Smart Onboard Witness Analytics, a vehicle-mounted dual-camera object detection and ALPR system) and a VIN/license plate recognition system for law enforcement — alongside consulting services in enterprise architecture, AI R&D, education, digital influencers, and AI agents. Deep technical expertise in custom neural networks, transformer architectures, and CNNs predating mainstream ML adoption.

history.origin_story: Founded by David Hláčik, an AI/ML Architect with foundational expertise in machine learning predating its widespread adoption. The studio builds custom neural network solutions and edge AI devices for real-world deployment.

key_milestones.event: Website launched; SOWA and VIN products publicly introduced

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: HLACIK's core products (SOWA, VIN) are hardware-embedded edge AI systems for public safety — the hardware integration and real-time edge deployment provide moderate moat. However, consulting services (digital influencers, AI agents, enterprise architecture) are more commoditizable by foundation models.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Law enforcement and fleet management AI is a real and growing market, but it is niche and procurement cycles are long. The company serves multiple verticals (public safety, marketing, HR) which signals uncertainty about core focus and PMF.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding; appears bootstrapped with only 2 team members. Very small Czech s.r.o. with no disclosed revenue or investors, and hardware product development requires significant capital.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Despite technically sophisticated products (edge AI for law enforcement), HLACIK is a 2-person bootstrapped studio with no public funding, unclear revenue, and a very broad service portfolio that may indicate early-stage product-market fit search.

metadata.notes: CNAIP URL not available. Company registered as HLACIK s.r.o. in Prague. Products: SOWA (vehicle edge AI) and VIN (license plate/VIN recognition for law enforcement). Website launched ~May 2025. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/hlacik/
